title: dianthus cinnamomeus
intro: Dianthus cinnamomeus, also known as fringed pink or pink feathertop, is a species of flowering plant in the carnation family, Dianthaceae. Traditionally, the plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, due to the presence of volatile oils. The health benefits of Dianthus cinnamomeus include its ability to soothe skin irritations, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues. The plant can be prepared for use through various herbal preparations, such as infusions, decoctions, and salves, which can be used to treat a range of conditions.
